//: Bundle-only overrides merged via `tauri build --config`. Kept out of the base tauri.conf.json so plain `cargo` workspace builds (CI lint/test, contributors) do not require the `binaries/nagori-<triple>` sidecar that tauri-build validates whenever externalBin is declared. The sidecar is staged by `beforeBuildCommand` (scripts/build-cli-sidecar.mjs) only on the bundle path.
